title: prd_existing_state
description: The scout's report on whether the idea overlaps a PRD / requirement doc already in the tree. An empty `overlaps` list is valid and means the idea is genuinely new.

overlaps.description: Existing PRDs / requirement docs the idea duplicates, extends, or conflicts with. Empty ⇒ no overlap found.

kind.description: in_progress ⇒ a PRD draft still being authored; accepted ⇒ a published PRD; feature ⇒ an upstream requirement / feature doc.

summary.description: One line: what the existing doc covers and how it overlaps.

recommendation.description: amend ⇒ fold the idea into this; supersede ⇒ replace it; new ⇒ overlap is incidental, proceed new.

roadmap_fit.description: Where the idea fits relative to the current PRD set / product direction.
